description: Privacy-first MCP server for Garmin Connect health, sleep, recovery and activities.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/garminmcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for Garmin Connect tokens. Defaults to ~/.garmin-mcp/garmin_tokens.json. Create it with garmin-mcp-server auth --install-helper.
environmentVariables.name: GARMIN_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw means full supported Garmin Connect payloads, not unrestricted raw sensor telemetry.
environmentVariables.name: GARMIN_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: GARMIN_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.garmin-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: GARMIN_CACHE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional Garmin domain override. Use garmin.cn only for China accounts; default is garmin.com.
environmentVariables.name: GARMIN_DOMAIN
